domains.name: Development with AWS Services

task_statements.text: Develop code for applications hosted on AWS
Use data stores in application development

topics: AWS SDK usage patterns (boto3, AWS SDK for JavaScript)
Amazon EventBridge event-driven patterns
Lambda environment configuration and VPC access
Lambda event lifecycle and Destinations
Lambda performance tuning and concurrency
DynamoDB partition keys, consistency models, and indexing
DynamoDB query vs scan patterns
Data serialization (JSON, Parquet) and caching with ElastiCache

domains.name: Security

task_statements.text: Implement authentication and/or authorization for applications and AWS services
Implement encryption by using AWS services
Manage sensitive data in application code

topics: Amazon Cognito user pools and identity pools
IAM least privilege for application code
Bearer tokens and STS for cross-service access
Encryption at rest vs in transit (KMS, S3, RDS)
AWS KMS key rotation and envelope encryption
Secrets Manager rotation from applications
Sensitive data classification and masking

domains.name: Deployment

task_statements.text: Prepare application artifacts to be deployed to AWS
Deploy code by using AWS CI/CD services

topics: CodeDeploy deployment strategies (blue/green, canary, rolling)
Lambda deployment traffic shifting with aliases
CI/CD pipelines with CodePipeline and CodeBuild
Elastic Beanstalk application deployments
API Gateway stages and custom domains
AWS SAM and CloudFormation template authoring
Application rollback and version management

domains.name: Troubleshooting and Optimization

task_statements.text: Assist in a root cause analysis
Optimize applications by using AWS services and features

topics: CloudWatch Logs Insights debugging
CloudWatch embedded metric format (EMF)
X-Ray trace analysis and annotations
Lambda concurrency throttling and reserved concurrency
Dead-letter queues and redrive policies
Application-level caching and request-header caching
Performance profiling and right-sizing Lambda memory
